issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on typical usage scenarios.
The skill provides high-level steps without concrete code snippets or runnable examples, limiting immediate execution.

scenarios.name: responsive-grouped-bar-chart
scenarios.rationale: Response B better meets the rubric by using .join for bars, a 750 ms transition, and a tooltip, whereas Response A uses .enter().append, a 800 ms transition, and lacks the required join syntax and resize handling.

scenarios.name: interactive-force-graph
scenarios.rationale: Both responses meet most rubric items, but neither implements the required 750 ms transition for node and link updates; Response A includes additional features (resize handling, more detailed tooltip) giving it a slightly higher score.
